generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles directional control interfaced with the lower-level chassis for steering actuation"
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Generates actuation commands (speed and steering) for execution on onboard hardware (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) in Physical Twin Entity"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental mapping and object detection sensor using LiDAR technology"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Visual perception and object tracking depth camera providing RGB-D data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated sensors measuring ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle in lower-level chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering before transmission"
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "RGB-D data from depth camera used for visual perception and object tracking"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle measurements"
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "Processed object tracks combining LiDAR and camera data after clustering and tracking"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN algorithm for clustering raw LiDAR point cloud data into meaningful object clusters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filters for tracking object states (position, velocity) from clustered point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance class I ACC logic for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCLogicEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data model containing speed and steering angle measurements of the ego vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data model containing position, velocity, and size of detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data stored in SQL database for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateDataModel, ObjectTracksDataModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based model representing vehicle, environment, and projected driving path for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and object tracking (Kalman filters) before data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataTranslationService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Gathers object tracks and vehicle state data for storage and reporting via Data Collecting FE"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService, ReportingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom functional entity for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from vehicle to Digital Twin, reducing computational burden on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object track data in external SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports of vehicle performance and object interactions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware enabling inter-component communication via ROS2 network for onboard components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance WiFiNetworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Networking solution for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering), object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Gathers and prepares object tracks and vehicle state data for storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCollectionAction
]

instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures interoperability between components via data serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationAction
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores processed data in SQL database for historical analysis and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance ACCComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC logic computation from vehicle to Digital Twin for reduced onboard processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enabling/disabling of ACC, setting desired speed, and sending emergency commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteParameterUpdateAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports of vehicle performance and object interactions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering), object tracks, and projected path in 3D environment"
]

instance DataCollectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Gathers object tracks and vehicle state data for storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTranslationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Serializes data and performs unit conversions for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Stores processed data in SQL database for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Allows remote adjustment of ACC parameters (desired speed, braking thresholds) via Control Panel"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking commands from User Entity to Actuation FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports of vehicle performance and object interactions"
]

// C1: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Entity [
    base:desc "Hosts actuation components (MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator) and data pre-processing (PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel)"
    base:contains ActuationFunctionalEntity, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Entity [
    base:desc "Hosts ACC logic (ACCControlModel), data collection (DataCollectionEnabler), and storage (DataStorageEnabler)"
    base:contains ACCLogicEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Entity [
    base:desc "Hosts visualization (3DVisualizationModel) and control interfaces (ControlPanel)"
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

// C5: Functional Entities
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Performs point cloud clustering and tracking before data transmission to Digital Twin"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Gathers object tracks and vehicle state data for storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Provides 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Enables remote parameter updates and emergency command issuance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C7: Environments
instance ROS2NetworkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Onboard communication network using ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    base:contains ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance WiFiNetworkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Inter-entity communication network using Wi-Fi for Physical Twin to Digital Twin communication"
    base:contains WiFiNetworkEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Onboard computing environment hosting Jetson hardware and ROS2 packages"
    base:contains ActuationFunctionalEntity, DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "External SQL database environment for storing time-series data"
    base:contains DataStorageEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
    - **Remote management commands** (e.g., enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent from the **User Entity** (via **Control Panel**) to the **Digital Twin Entity**.
    - **ACC control logic** executed in the **Controlling FE**, which computes the desired speed based on the lead vehicle's distance and sends it back to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
    - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage and steering adjustments) executed on the vehicle's onboard hardware (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at a **real-time scale** with the following constraints:
    - **End-to-end latency** between the vehicle and DT must not exceed **100 ms** (as per **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication).
    - **Clock synchronization** between components must be accurate to **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations).
    The DT services (e.g., ACC computation, visualization) are synchronized with the PT's operational time to ensure low-latency decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **ISO 23247-based architecture** with the following orchestration:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **actuation (motor/steering)** and **data pre-processing (LiDAR/camera)**.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data collection (Data Collecting FE)**, **report generation (Reporting FE)**, and **data storage (SQL database)**.
    - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization (User Interface FE)** and **Control Panel (User Interface FE)**.
    - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication.
    The system is deployed across **three hardware layers**: onboard vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano), external cloud/edge (for DT services), and user interface (remote workstation)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is primarily used during the **Operation phase** of the vehicle lifecycle, supporting:
    - **Real-time monitoring and remote management** of the **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)** system.
    - **Development and troubleshooting** by developers, leveraging data collection and visualization capabilities to debug and optimize the system.
    The DTS is not explicitly designed for **design-phase validation** (e.g., CAD-based simulation) or **predictive maintenance** (e.g., CREO Simulate integration), though these are mentioned in related work. The twinning focuses on **as-operated** representations, with real-time synchronization to the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Real-time synchronization** with **±100 ms clock accuracy** and **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
    - **Validation against ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I compliance.
    - **Data integrity mechanisms** in the **Data Translation FE** (e.g., unit conversions, message alignment).
    - **Uncertainty management**: Kalman filters for object tracking and **DBSCAN** for robust point cloud clustering.
    - **Verification**: Publicly available **source code** and **demonstration** for reproducibility and third-party validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Network Protocols**:
        - **ROS2** for onboard communication between sensors, actuators, and software components.
        - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (Physical Twin Entity ↔ Digital Twin Entity ↔ User Entity).
    - **Data Formats**: Custom serialization and unit conversion via the **Data Translation FE**.
    - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency (as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** onboard the vehicle.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **remote workstation** for visualization and control.
    - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** for storing time-series data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2)** for the reference architecture and entity-based design.
    - **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I compliance.
    - **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
    - **ROS2** for middleware standardization in onboard communication.
    - **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK** for hardware-specific standardization."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Low-latency requirements** (≤100 ms) to ensure real-time operation and safety-critical responses (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Clock synchronization** (±100 ms) for event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
    - **Remote management safeguards**: User commands (e.g., emergency braking) are validated before execution.
    - **Data integrity**: The **Data Translation FE** ensures consistent data formats and unit conversions.
    - **Safety-critical operation**: The DT is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (per **David and Bork taxonomy**), where humans monitor but do not directly control safety-critical actions."
]
